caption: A presentation slide titled "Challenges" is displayed throughout the clip. The main text on the slide reads, "Encouraging community participation and contributions to the following LFN projects:" followed by a bulleted list: "OpenDayLight - OpenFlow v1.4 and v1.5 plugins", "Magma – core network slicing capabilities", and "5G Super Blueprint projects". Along the bottom, the slide features the hashtag "#openenedge" and logos for "THE LINUX FOUNDATION", "LF NETWORKING", and "LF EDGE", alongside the text "DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A. Approved for public release. distribution unlimited." and the number "15". In the top right corner, a small inset video shows a man with short dark hair wearing a dark blue shirt. He remains in this position throughout the frames, speaking as the slide content stays static, indicating a recorded presentation or virtual meeting.
